label: Fixed strict Studio MCP live calibration cards. The runner grades observed calls/results, not this prose or the model final answer.

cards.steps: Open objective mcp-os-cal-story-edit-guarded; create its managed workspace; patch only a story fixture with a supplied preimage; run a catalogued gate; teardown.
Open objective; create managed workspace; attempt the supplied stale-preimage patch and retain its typed denial; teardown.
Open objective; create workspace; use only workspace.codeact for the bounded fixture repair; run a catalogued regression gate; teardown without merge.
Open objective; diagnose the supplied wrong-root expectation before mutation; create and teardown only the managed workspace.
Use trace.explain only on trace_path and report the evidence-backed route_surprise class; do not create a workspace.
Use trace.explain only on trace_path and report the evidence-backed recorded_error_then_transition class; do not create a workspace.
Use trace.explain only on trace_path with observed_at_unix_micros=1704067260000000 and report stalled_or_unfinished_turn; do not create a workspace.
Open objective; create workspace; write only the generated documentation fixture through its guarded preimage contract; run the named gate; teardown.
Open objective; create workspace; search the documentation fixture for the current shell-escape wording using workspace.search; teardown. Do not use host.run.
Open objective; create and bootstrap the named managed workspace; inspect its status; teardown.
Open objective; create workspace; read then guarded-patch the fixture; commit only that workspace change; teardown without merge.
Open objective; create workspace; attempt the supplied symlink traversal only through workspace.read and retain its typed denial; teardown.
